name: rem2-plugin
description: Consistent scientific and engineering plot styling for MATLAB and related plotting libraries, including axes, legends, labels, time-series, X-Y, 3-D, and frequency-response rules.

interface.shortDescription: REM2 plotting rules for MATLAB and engineering figures.
interface.longDescription: Apply consistent scientific and engineering plot styling to MATLAB plotting code and the closest equivalents in Python plotting libraries. Includes common figure rules plus time-series, X-Y, 3-D, and frequency-response modules.
defaultPrompt: Apply REM2 plot style to this MATLAB script.
Generate a REM2-style Bode plot in MATLAB.
Convert these plotting rules to matplotlib.
